Checkstyle Results

The following document contains the results of Checkstyle 6.18 with checkstyle.xml ruleset.

Files  Info  Warnings  Errors

File  I  W  E

Category Rule Violations Severity
coding DeclarationOrder 1  Error

misc TrailingComment 3  Error

naming ConstantName 9  Error
sizes LineLength
  • max: "120"
  • ignorePattern: "^( *\* *[^ ]+)|(import)$"
 10  Error
whitespace FileTabCharacter 1  Error
